scripts.install:all: npm --prefix src/backend ci && npm --prefix src/view ci
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix src/backend run typecheck && npm --prefix src/view run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --prefix src/backend run build && npm --prefix src/view run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix src/backend test && npm --prefix src/view test
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix src/backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix src/view run test:coverage
scripts.audit: npm --prefix src/backend audit --omit=dev && npm --prefix src/view audit --omit=dev
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run coverage && npm run audit && npm run load:test
